calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-04-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter is on calendar this day for Small Claims Appeal before
the Honorable Judge Pro Tem ELliot Myles

Appearances: RONI ROTHOLZ, ESQ (925)932-0193, FOR SHULA BENSIMON, APPELLANT / DEFENDANT
LETICIA LUNA, RESPONDENT / PLAINTIFF

All parties are sworn.

Leticia Luna testifies on her own behalf.
Roni Rotholz,Esq gives an opening statements on behalf of Shula Bensimon.

Respondent's group exhibit No. 1(LEASE) is marked for identification.

At the conclusion of today's hearing the Court takes this matter under submission.
Exhibits SHALL BE PICKED UP, OR THEY WILL BE DESTROYED pursuant to CCP 1952.

Elliot Myles, JPT; Clerk: R. Goulding; NOT REPORTED

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Nov-02-2017 Judgment Entered
